response.text:
ACCEPT
rationale: r1c4 is in critical depletion (0.10 SoC) below our 0.2 threshold, our policy is generous sharing, and geographic circle is the only available mechanism to prevent imminent failure.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r1c4. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'normal'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.10 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=generous, share_min_soc_frac=0.2, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: r0c3 and r1c4 are in critical depletion (0.10 SoC) and will fail within minutes; geographic sharing is the only mechanism available and must be activated immediately..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
